description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a bear, featuring a dark brown fabric exterior with a lighter brown patch on its belly and a small white spot in the center of the patch. The bear has round, black button-like eyes and a small, triangular black nose, giving it a simple and endearing facial expression. Its ears are rounded and positioned symmetrically on top of its head. There is a green patch sewn onto its right arm and two additional patches, one green and one gray, on its back, suggesting repairs or decorative details. The limbs are short and rounded, with the arms slightly outstretched and the legs bent at the hips. The overall appearance is soft, cuddly, and well-loved, with visible stitching around the patches and belly.
description: A soft, dark brown stuffed bear with a lighter brown belly patch, button eyes, and several sewn-on fabric patches. The toy has a simple, endearing face and a cuddly, plush body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, button eyes, triangular nose, light brown belly patch with a white spot, and a green patch on the right arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, rounded ear, protruding nose, and the green patch on the arm.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two sewn patches (one green, one gray) on the back and the rounded shape of the head and limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the bear's profile, rounded ear, and the absence of patches on this side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with round black eyes and a small triangular nose. There is no visible mouth, giving the bear a calm and simple appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The bear is sitting upright with its arms slightly outstretched and legs bent at the hips, giving it a welcoming and relaxed posture.
